programme.title: Rastamouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Safe'. The bank is mysteriously closed and Sterling the bank manager is nowhere to be found!

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Eustreptospondylus and Ammonite'. Andy finds out about dinosaurs that lived in the sea, including turtles, the graceful ichthyosaur and a terrifying eustreptospondylus.

programme.title: Andy's Prehistoric Adventures
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Australopithecus and Tool'. Andy travels back in time to the Great Rift Valley in Africa to meet one of man's very own ancient ancestors, the australopithecus.

programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Andy and the Treeshrew'. Andy heads to the rainforests of Borneo in search of a treeshrew and its favourite food.

programme.desc: 'S8/E20 - Shooting Stars'. Nina investigates what shooting stars are, with the help of Luke, her sight neuron.

programme.title: Catie's Amazing Machines

programme.title: My Pet And Me: Vet Tales
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Bonbon the Guinea Pig'. Rory visits Sebastian and his pet guinea pig Bonbon who has a lump on her leg that needs checked by the vet. Ferne goes to meet a vet who is caring for a badger at a wildlife hospital.

programme.title: My Pet And Me
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Community Farm'. Rory heads to a community farm to meet some children who love spending time there with all the different animals.

programme.desc: 'S1/E29'. When Larry gets the hiccups, the strange noises he makes causes havoc in the Gorge. Will he have to move away forever?

programme.title: Swashbuckle

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Postman Pat and the Seaside Special'. Toot Toot! It's the 'Seaside Special' (the beautiful bright green Greendale Flyer), stoking it's engines ready for a trip to the seaside!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Postman Pat and the Chinese Dragon'. It's 'Chinese Day' at school and the children are looking forward to Chinese themed celebrations. Michael has ordered a Chinese Dragon costume which Pat picks up at the sorting office.

programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - Abracadabra'. When the Farmer decides to throw out his magic set, Shaun decides to put on a show - but things get out of hand when the flock start disappearing!

programme.desc: 'S1/E42'. Supertato is out chasing a milkshake robot and leaves Broccoli in charge of Tato Tower. Evil Pea tries to take over the tower, but Broccoli puts on a great defence.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - Mile-High Clubbed'. Two survivalists are tested in the Colorado Rocky Mountains. They face hailstorms and hypothermic conditions during their 21-day challenge.

programme.desc: 'S7/E9 - A Tangled Web In Texas'. An impulsive adventurer is paired with a cautious archaeologist in the Texas desert. Together, they must endure scorching days, frigid nights, and tarantulas.

programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - The Pound Zone'. Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to reach the gold they must make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Meanwhile, Fred brings in a new miner.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - No Guts, No Glory Holes'. A call from the mining authorities causes issues. Dustin's crew face their biggest challenge yet: to build their largest, most powerful winch system.

programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Sue's Custom '56 Ford, Part 2'. Thomas and Tom pick up a rusted '67 Chevelle to flip for money towards Sue Yu-Lan Martin's '56 Ford truck. Sue brings Richard Rawlings into the fold.

programme.title: Misfit Garage
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Guardian Of The Galaxie'. With a 48-hour deadline looming, the Fired Up Garage crew rush to complete Sue's '56 Ford truck, only to find their tools have been stolen!

programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Galaxie Quest: Barrett Jackson'. With Jordan out of the picture and a looming Barrett-Jackson deadline, John Klump steps in to help the crew finish the 1964 Ford Galaxie.

programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Rattleless Rattlesnake'. Experts explain where to find an enchanted underwater forest. Plus, why have some rattlesnakes on a remote Mexican island lost their rattle?

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: 'S5/E17'. The Bishop and Scotty struggle to make safe a wall and end up causing an avalanche. Meanwhile, the Mooka Boys' bobcat is hit with critical failure.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Coasts'. David Attenborough presents the first in a new series. Coasts: where two worlds collide, and where animals fight for survival amidst constant change.

programme.title: Race Across The World: Celebrity...
programme.desc: 'Race Across The World: Celebrity Special. S1/E6'. It's a race to the finish line in Tromsø for the four celebrity teams. Which will get there first and be crowned champions?

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Papua New Guinea'. Martin travels to Papua New Guinea and lives amongst the farmers.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E13 - Bulletproof'. Alaskans contend with the throes of the warm season.

programme.title: The Secret Genius Of Modern Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Passport'. Hannah gains access to a top-secret site where anonymous staff and the latest tech work to make the British passport one of the most secure documents on the planet.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. A tiny chameleon faces the journey of a lifetime in a Madagascan forest, and a water vole in Scotland swims across a loch and scales a mountain to find new territory and a mate.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Coasts'. David Attenborough presents the first in a new series. Coasts: where two worlds collide, and where animals fight for survival amidst constant change.

programme.title: Arctic Vets
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Dr Chris responds to an emergency call for a wild bald eagle who's possibly been electrocuted. Meanwhile, Jackie and Heather head Churchill to honour his legacy.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 - Black Pearl Sailing Yacht'. A look onboard the $200million Black Pearl, which is the largest sailing yacht in the world, but has also been built to sail faster than any ship of its size.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Qinghai - Tibet Railway'. A look at the Qinhai-Tibet line, the highest railway in the world, including the engineering challenges faced at high altitude and in bitterly cold temperatures.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - London's Super Sewer'. In this episode, a multi billion pound 32 kilometre super sewer tunnelled underneath the feet of nine million Londoners.

programme.title: Africa's Giant Killers
programme.desc: Africa's largest herd of elephants and a fearless pride of young lions come face to face in an epic fight for survival.

programme.title: Return Of The Giant Killers
programme.desc: A pride of lions has rewritten the rules - they have learnt to take down elephants.

programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. A tiny chameleon faces the journey of a lifetime in a Madagascan forest, and a water vole in Scotland swims across a loch and scales a mountain to find new territory and a mate.

programme.title: Earth's Seasonal Secrets
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Autumn'. With winter fast approaching, life on Earth must get ready - and that means feeding up while you can, fighting for the last chance to breed and rushing to grow up before the cold returns.

programme.title: Earth's Seasonal Secrets
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Winter'. With their world encased in snow and ice, animals must find the most inventive ways to survive and even benefit from the cold, dark winters on Earth.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - London's Super Sewer'. In this episode, a multi billion pound 32 kilometre super sewer tunnelled underneath the feet of nine million Londoners.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Bluewaters Island'. In this episode, a vast new island is appearing from the seas off Dubai to house the world's biggest observation wheel - twice the size of the London Eye.

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In this episode we take a closer look at the planets most incredible metropolitan railways and explore how they help us solve our distinctly urban problems.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S51/E6 - Black History Month'. Four chefs celebrate Black History Month through incredible food. A hearty soup and a Southern vegetable inspire the chefs in the entree round.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S20/E11 - Cowboy Cookie Swap'. Ree makes a variety of sweet festive treats! They include cinnamon roll cookies, red velvet crinkle cookies and no-bake cornflake wreaths.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S20/E12 - Easy Comfort'. Ree makes a tasty combo of two comforting classics in one breakfast: carrot cake French toast. Dishes also include corn and chili chowder and fried tomato sandwich!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S20/E13 - Healthy-ish!'. Ree makes almost healthy versions of classics! They include cheeseburger sliders with Portobello mushrooms instead of buns, cauliflower fried rice and zucchini lasagne.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S21/E1 - Night Out Night In'. Ree and Ladd enjoy a night in together with some delicious dishes. She makes surf and turf skewers, romaine wedge salad with a tasty ranch dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S21/E2 - Done And Dusted'. Ree has two busy days ahead of her so she prepares some meals in advance. Her recipes include maple sausage breakfast burritos and cobb-wedge salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S21/E3 - Cheap And Easy'. Ree makes cheap and easy dishes that are perfect for mid-week dinners. The meals include slow cooker teriyaki ribs, cheesy rigatoni pepper bake and Tex-Mex meatballs.

programme.desc: 'S21/E4 - Osage Cowboy's Lunch'. Ree makes a classic lunch for her husband and the cowboys. She brings them cheeseburger meatloaf, spicy green beans and grab-and-go cow patty cookies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S21/E5 - Quarterback Training'. Ree cooks a dinner for the hungry guys. Her recipes include ranch chicken taquitos with sour cream dip, hearty Mexican rice and beans and a delicious dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S21/E6 - Chocolate Appreciation Day'. Ree Drummond makes a Mississippi mud cake and white chocolate macadamia nut cookies. Plus, she shows how to make her easy chocolate tart.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S21/E7 - Back Office Bash'. Ree makes a selection of dishes for a casual office party. Her menu includes maple bacon dip with apples, Italian cheese sticks and crab Rangoon and fried wontons.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S21/E8 - Drummond Home Cooking'. Ree Drummond makes an edible thank you package featuring grape lemonade, old-fashioned chicken stew and a sweet lemon and raspberry cream cake.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S28/E1 - Switch Up Your Spring Feast'. The hosts are rewriting the rule book for a spring feast with fun, new recipes. They include jalapeno honey ham, and rosemary devilled potatoes.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S51/E7 - Chocolate Frenzy'. The chefs are blessed with an abundance of the so-called food of the gods. In the first round, the competitors attempt to make duck and chocolate fly.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S9/E7 - Puppy Treats'. Valerie and Duff challenge six young bakers to make tasty treats for puppies. The dessert must reflect the puppy's first birthday or their life after adoption.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S9/E8 - Edible Expressions'. Valerie and Duff challenge each of the five bakers to create a giant cookie face with 3-D features that communicate assigned expressions.

programme.desc: 'S26/E15 - From Spicy To Icy'. Guy Fieri heats up with spice and cools off with ice! He visits a hot BBQ joint in California, a Cajun spot in Virginia and a Hawaiian place's tropical shaved ice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S26/E16 - Island And Desert'. Guy Fieri hunts desert and island flavour. He enjoys nostalgic breakfast tarts at a café in California and fish and chips at a gluten-free spot in Hawaii.

programme.desc: 'S10/E23 - Me Myself And Ivy'. The buyers head to Arcadia, where Darrell gives and takes, Ivy's prospects soar, plus Rene and Casey find a his and hers locker.

programme.desc: 'S10/E24 - 666 The Sign Of The Profit'. Not even the 'cupped hands' of San Bernardino can save Mary's fortune, but Ivy manages to scrap together a bit of coin, while Kenny finds all the magic.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: 'S13/E20 - The Mystery Of Mount Shasta'. Mount Shasta in northern California is known as a hotbed of strange events, from Bigfoot sightings to UFO encounters to hikers vanishing without a trace.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: 'S13/E7 - The Human Experiment'. Scientists now know that seven human-like species lived alongside Homo sapiens for thousands of years. But why is it that only humans survived?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: 'S13/E22 - Top 10 - Mysterious Sites'. Strange places where amazing things happen. Discover the top ten most mysterious sites on the planet.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: 'S13/E25 - Top 10 - Cover Ups'. Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten alien cover-ups, from the famous Roswell Incident to a secret military base rumoured to be housing extraterrestrial technology.

programme.desc: 'S13/E24 - Top 10 - Encounters'. Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten extraterrestrial encounters.

programme.desc: 'S10/E25 - Tour de Chance'. The girls have a newlywed-themed surprise for Emily. Rene reels in a huge locker, while Darrell tests his bicycle knowledge... and wins.

programme.desc: 'S10/E26 - The Wild Wild Vests'. The oldest facility in Los Angeles is where the newest buyers make their debut. Brandi and Jarrod try to piece their way to a win.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S10/E27 - Out Of The Frying Pan Am'. The buyers hit Dan's home town, and the Vegas Ladies' locker really takes off. Kenny's purchase sets his wallet alight.

programme.desc: 'S10/E28 - Some Don't Like It Hot'. It's the hottest day ever in Riverside and Kenny starts seeing things. Ivy gives Mary a boost, while Shana and Edwina stumble across their own paradise.

programme.desc: 'S10/E29 - Season Of The Kitch'. In Victorville, Brandi and Jarrod's mischievous side emerges. Ivy grabs a locker that no one else can tolerate, while Mary puts the new guy in his place.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S10/E30 - A Metaphoric Layer Of True Romanticism'. Ivy takes it to the house in nearby Lancaster, while Dave takes advantage of being so close to Ivy. Meanwhile, Justin pushes all of Rene's buttons, and comes out ahead.

programme.desc: 'S10/E31 - Kumba Yuuup!'. The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away, leaving them only scraps.

programme.desc: 'S10/E19 - The Clamper Caper'. Brandi and Jarrod uncover an Illuminati-ng stash. Dave does what he does best, while Mary finally gets the help she needs.

programme.desc: Despite all a lady does and having an affair with her husband's best friend, he loves her still. But the table turns when her child's father shows up.

programme.title: Dead Alive
programme.desc: A man whose twin brother dies at birth is confronted with the reality of a double personalities.

programme.title: Riona
programme.desc: 'S1/E121 of 260'. Tsema trusts Jereoma with her secret. Tosan goes to Misan with her findings. Kumene is buried.

programme.title: Blue Blood In Red Soil
programme.desc: The life and times of Oba Kosoko is defeated by the British invaders. We go back and look through his original palace while meeting the current Oba.

programme.title: Humour Hangout
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 11'. Comedian koffi sits with entertainers in a bid to know more about them and their crafts.

programme.title: Butterfly
programme.desc: A promise made by the Prince to marry a maiden suffers when he comes across the butterfly - a lady gifted in herbs and heart.

programme.title: Chimamanda
programme.desc: Months after the demise of her sister, Chimamanda is forced to marry her sister's fiancé.

programme.title: Walk In My Shoes
programme.desc: A young girl is faced with an offer that could change her life and that of her family forever.

programme.title: Royal Bliss
programme.desc: A lady is banished from her village but find favors in a far away land. The prince decides to marry her, but the prince's family will not let him marry a nobody.

programme.title: International Chef
programme.desc: A king and the queen have a son rotting in jail, they connived with someone else and made Tina pregnant. Now the king and queen will have Chizoba to contend with.

programme.title: Amanda
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 12'. After Amanda's parent died in the cold hands of her uncle, he plans for her to be taken to the city to get maltreated, but light shines at the end of the tunnel.

programme.title: Daughters Of Eagle
programme.desc: The daughter of the Eagle has sworn to give war in school, but the black widow will stop at nothing to win this battle.

programme.title: Pains Of Amaka
programme.desc: Emeka gets Amaka pregnant, but with the wicked help of Amaka's friend, the relationship ends in a flash, leaving Amaka in pains.

programme.title: Razor Customs

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Workshop

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Will and Gus look to make some quick cash as they fix and wrap a Toyota MR2 MK2, but it remains to be seen whether there is any money to be made from this low-spec car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E186 of 260'. Ewa vra Steve om oop kaarte te speel, en At verwoord sy vrese. Brian stem in om Louis met sy plan te help. Gaby wil behoorlik asem skep, terwyl 'n gesprek met Soekie vir Conrad ontstem.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E187 of 260'. Zee maak seker Liam en Karen is voorbereid op hulle beurt, en Annelize en Steve benodig Ewa se hulp. Rian probeer om vir Tertius van sy planne te laat afsien.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E188 of 260'. Karen en Liam se uitnodiging gooi almal, terwyl Bonnie sukkel om haar beste voetjie voor te sit met Brian. At het baie om te verduidelik, en Soekie smokkel met Conrad se kop.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E189 of 260'. Jacques het nuus oor Soekie, terwyl Lexi 'n ernstige gesprek met Steve wil hê. Bonnie se bekentenis aan Naomi sit haar aan die dink. Annetjie se emosies tem nie haar kompeterende gees nie.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E190 of 260'. Louis gaan nie maklik van stryk gebring word nie, en Steve smokkel met Annelize se kop. Bonnie se groot aand breek aan, en Soekie begin die legkaartstukke bymekaar sit.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E230 of 260'. Zoë is vasberade om Nazeem te help, terwyl Siya op soek is na 'n ekstra bron van inkomste. Mymoena reik uit na Sammy en Angie verras vir Wade.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E231 of 260'. Siya begin met sy nuwe werk, terwyl Angie 'n kitsoplossing vir haar verkoue soek. Bridgette is geskok oor Zoe se betrokkenheid by Nazeem, en hy is bitter teenoor sy familie.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E232 of 260'. Siya en Danni bereik 'n ooreenkoms oor hulle toekoms, maar Danni het ander idees. Daar is konflik by JPD oor Tim se rol, terwyl Wade op 'n geheimsinnige uitstappie gaan.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E233 of 260'. Carlo doen skaduwerk by Tim terwyl daar weer konflik tussen die Thuli's is. Mymoena is op 'n wolkie na haar kursus saam met Sammy, maar hoe lank gaan dit hou?

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S9/E234 of 260'. Die Thulis se dag is vol verrassings, terwyl Sammy weer oop kaarte met Bridgette speel. Wade skuld Angie 'n verduideliking, en die geleentheid van 'n leeftyd kom oor Tim se pad.

programme.title: Arendsvlei

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S6/E86 of 144'. Janice ruk haarself uit die skok van haar geheue terugkry. Saartjie sukkel om 'n geleentheid te kry om Bianca van Danté te vertel. Abigail vind uit hoekom Kyle nie meer kom kuier nie.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S6/E87 of 144'. Abigail maak dit duidelik dat sy ontsteld is oor Beatrice se nuwe gas. Saartjie bring 'n kêrel huistoe. Janice probeer hard om haar taak te voltooi, al wil sy met alle mag huis toe gaan.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S6/E88 of 144'. Bianca sukkel nog met die feit dat Saartjie 'n kêrel het. Kyle wonder of sy spyt te laat gekom het. Janice sit haar ondersoek voort in die Galant-huis.

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 13'. Shamiem Bell is 'n man met 'n plan. As hy nie vure bestry nie, dink, praat en spandeer hy tyd met karre en die community.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Mel Gibson and Danny Glover reprise their roles as the chaotic cop partners. This time they must put an end to the Triad before the Triad puts an end to them.

programme.title: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: Ice Cube and Mike Epps chase the money in this comedy. When a bail jumper discovers $20 million in stolen diamonds, he and the bounty hunter chasing him team up to steal them.

programme.title: Little Dixie
programme.desc: A gritty action thriller about a man who brokers a truce between a US governor and a cartel. But when the truce collapses, he does whatever it takes to protect his daughter.

programme.title: Miss Willoughby And The Haunted...
programme.desc: 'Miss Willoughby And The Haunted Bookshop'. Mystery drives this thrilling film. A professor is enlisted by old family friends to solve a paranormal mystery at their antique bookshop.

programme.title: Injustice
programme.desc: A dark superhero animation. After the Joker tricks Superman into killing Lois Lane, Superman decides to take control of Earth, forcing Batman and his allies to stop him.

programme.title: The Best Man
programme.desc: Dolph Lundgren and Luke Wilson star in this action film in which a wedding turns into a hostage situation. The best man, groom, and their drunken pal must save the day.

programme.title: Rift
programme.desc: A gripping action thriller. Jason Cole, an FBI Agent, appears to have it all until his past rears its head and propels him into a situation he could not have prepared for.

programme.title: A Perfect Plan
programme.desc: A riveting crime action film. Four notorious thieves are forced by a cunning master thief to plan and commit an extraordinary diamond heist.

programme.title: Torque
programme.desc: Famed music video director Joseph Kahn directs Ice Cube in this action film about an unsuspecting biker who gets caught in the middle of a gang rivalry after he's framed for murder.

programme.title: Into The Storm
programme.desc: It's man versus nature in this thrilling disaster film. A group of storm chasers and the residents of a small town try and survive a tornado superstorm.

programme.title: Muru
programme.desc: Inspired by actual events. A local police sergeant must choose between his badge and his people when the government launches an armed raid through his community on a school day.

programme.title: Cop Out
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars in this comedy. A cop was going to use a rare baseball card to pay for his daughter's wedding. When it's stolen, he and his partner have to track it down.

programme.title: Fast X
programme.desc: The 10th instalment of this acclaimed blockbuster action franchise. Dom and his family confront their most lethal opponent yet - a terrifying threat from the shadows of the past.

programme.title: Ava
programme.desc: Jessica Chastain leads a star-studded cast in this action thriller. An assassin working for a black ops organisation has to fight for her life when a job goes dangerously wrong.

programme.title: Hot Seat
programme.desc: Mel Gibson plays a fearless bomb expert in this cyber-thriller. An ex-hacker is forced to break into high-level banking institutions while having a bomb strapped to his chair.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A chilling, twisted addition to the Evil Dead franchise. Two estranged sisters' reunion is cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a battle for survival.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E94 - Sipping With the Enemy, Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets'. Candace tries to bust the boys for putting on a magic show, then tries to find an item to trade for a rare piece of memorabilia.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E95 - Doofapus, Norm Unleashed'. The boys' device accidentally liquefies Candace. Doof has jury duty so robot Norm takes over the day's evil scheme - using weapons to destroy Danville.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - School Clubbing'. The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the Friends of Animals, Dusty the TV Club, Herman the Wrestling Club and Chance the Journalism Club.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - LOL the Vote'. Chance hopes to be voted Class Clown for a record-breaking fourth year, but finds Bailey is also vying for the title. Dusty is hoping to be voted Most Academic.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S3/E75 - Felix'. Students Marinette and Adrien transform into superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir, to save Paris by capturing evil creatures, Akumas, which transform people into villains.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E109 - Blues Beard's Revenge'. When Ivy returns from a cruise, acting completely different, Booker and Neil try to get her back to normal. Alice finds out an old rival is a student at her middle school.

programme.title: Raven's Home
programme.desc: 'S6/E112 - Lizard Let Lie'. On the eve of Raven's big reality show debut, Alice lies to get out of a class speech, and Victor tries to get out of a surprise health inspection.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Baby Please'. Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk The Prank
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - The Moustached Kid'. When a new kid shows up at school sporting a moustache, all the girls want to date him (including Bailey) and all the boys are jealous of him.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E83 - What a Croc!, Ferb TV'. Phineas and Ferb try to find an escaped crocodile. Perry discovers Doof has invented a chicken replaceinator and is going to replace his brother, the mayor, with a chicken.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E84 - Mom's in the House, Minor Monogram'. While Mom's out, the boys decide to take Perry out for a walk. When they can't find him, they decide to build a giant replica.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E87 - Agent Doof, Phineas and Ferb and the Temple of Juatchadoon'. Doof decides to stop being evil and be good. He joins the agency as a probationer, and Perry is put in charge of him.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Principal Dance Socks'. Helen knits a pair of magical socks for Principal Secretary so he can beat a rival school's principal in a dance battle, but this newfound 'talent' quickly goes to his head.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Pool Party/Road Trip'. Helen agrees to cast a swim spell on Barry if Kiff introduces her to Candle's dad, Roy Fox, A road trip goes arwy when scary-looking bikers pursue the Chatterleys and Barry.

programme.title: Descendants Wicked World
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Good Is the New Bad'. The competition is fierce at Auradon's annual singing competition. When each team tries to outshine the other, they realize that they harmonize better when they're together.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E96 - Wishmaker'. As Marinette thinks about her future, a supervillain shows up in Paris. Able to force people to live their childlhood dreams, he turns into a nightmare for our heroes.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E97 - Simpleman'. A relative of Marinette's is akumatized into Simplificator, a supervillain determined to simplify this overly complex world.

programme.title: Zombies: The Re-animated Series
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Robot Space Bear'. A sci-fi robot-bear has Zed and Addison cornered, but their debate - fight it or talk to it? - raises a greater question: Should they call it Robot Space Bear, or Space Bear Robot?

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - The Haunted Jukebox'. When a haunted jukebox sends Amy and Hartley to an alternate dimension of Valley View, they must figure out how to get home before they are trapped in Monster Town forever.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - The Scare'. Amy, Hartley and Colby sneak into Gem's house to get rid of a video that will expose Amy's secret. Celia and Jake prank Vic and Eva, so they vow to exact revenge.

programme.title: The Villians of Valley View
programme.desc: 'S2/E30 - Family Secrets'. Hartley encourages Amy to learn more about her dad's family. When she does, it becomes clear Vic is hiding something. After some digging, Amy unearths a shocking family secret.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Bad Hair Day/Meatloaf Surprise'. Candace overuses the boys' hair growing machine and is mistaken for a rare orangutan. The boys build a bustworthy bounce house in their back garden. Jamie Oliver guest stars.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E77 - My Fair Goalie'. Ferb's English cousins visit and accuse Ferb of having lost his Britishness. His American friends disagree, and the row escalates until the two sides challenge each other to a match.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: 'S3/E75 - Mommy Can You Hear Me?, Road Trip'. Candace is in bed with an injured ankle, so the boys help stop her getting bored - and she unwittingly saves their cosmonaut friend from an approaching obstacle.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E80 - Virtually Christmas'. When Cricket gets snowed in at the Remingtons' on Christmas Eve, he attempts to recreate his family's Christmas Eve traditions in a virtual reality video game.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S3/E61 - Squashed!'. It's Halloween! When Bill is disappointed by the tiny pumpkins he grew, Tilly steals an alien compound to grow the pumpkins and make her papa happy.

programme.title: Big City Greens

programme.title: Chip 'n' Dale: Park Life

programme.title: Chip 'n' Dale: Park Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E23 - Prickly Pair/Dale and Daler/Time Traveller: Part 1'. Chip will do anything to get Dale to taste cactus fruit. When Chip's nose gets sunburnt the park animals mistake him for Dale.

programme.title: Chip 'n' Dale: Park Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - The Hole Truth/The Gift/Pest Friends'. Dale believes they deserve punishment for a heinous crime. / Dale finds a hauntingly beautiful gift for Chip's birthday. / Chip and Dale may torment Donald - but who is the real park pest?

programme.title: Chip 'n' Dale: Park Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 - In the Sewers/The Grand Crow Prix/The Candlemaker'. Chip and Dale confront their dark sides in the depths of the sewers. When Chip starts competing in crow races Dale's competitive side goes into overdrive.

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - U.f. Uh-oh! Part I / U.f. Uh-oh! Part Ii'. The Grant-Gomez family take a trip to Las Vegas where Dave and Carolina ponder life without kids, Kevin, Hamster, and Gretel encounter their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Grounded/Sleepover with the Enemy'. Gretel is grounded as a meat monster strikes, Gretel is suspicious of a new student in class.

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel

programme.title: Hamster & Gretel

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S4/E16 - A Big Bumblebee And A Bossy Grace'. Buddy creates a giant Bumblebee cake to promote the movie Transformers 3. Meanwhile, Grace is left in charge of the bakery.

programme.desc: 'S4/E17 - Competition, Complications And Communion'. Buddy's bowling themed cake leads to a boys vs. girls bowling match. Plus, Buddy bakes a first communion cake for Sophia.

programme.desc: 'S4/E18 - Bugs, Break Ups And Burnt-Out'. Buddy is asked to make a cake with real insects as the ingredients, but he won't let bugs into his kitchen! He also makes a cake for a friend in need.

programme.desc: 'S4/E19 - Moving Cake, Marbles And Mess-Ups'. Buddy creates an actual moving go-cart cake. Later, a friend of the family requests a special birthday cake for someone turning 101 years old!

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S4/E2 - The Black Hole Next Door'. When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Return To The Mother Lode'. As the battle for McCarthy wages on, a team of experts work to locate the only known entrance into the Mother Lode mine. But will they find it?

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The End Of The Frontier'. Neil breaks through to the Mother Lode mine but locals are too busy defending against waking bears to stop him and Jenny goes on a solo bear-hunt of her own.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Dead Men Tell Tales'. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey investigate a jail in Florida. Rumours suggest murderous spirits are lurking in this property.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - A Massive Discovery'. The team decide to split up and corner Bigfoot. Mireya travels on horseback to find evidence, while Ronny recruits a psychic specialist to find the creature.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: 'S6/E4 - Huckleberry's Monster'. Huckleberry reveals his family's terrifying brush with the Grafton Monster. Later, Buck gets into a fistfight with locals under the moonlight.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Sweet Springs Sanitarium'. The team encounters its alleged darkest, most-terrifying paranormal activity yet at a cursed sanitarium in West Virginia. What will they discover?
